stemHtml: When an inadmissible person is returned to the operator for removal, the operator…

options.a: Is not precluded from recovering transportation costs from that person.
options.b: Shall not recover any transportation costs from that person.
options.c: Shares responsibility for the person with the state of the operator.
options.d: Is not responsible for the person's inadmissibility and shall not be responsible for repatriation.
